ThingDef.label: Jade hand
ThingDef.description: Using the jade as the shell, the movable hand of the wooden organ is hidden inside. Due to the good material and the human body phase, coupled with the smart organ, this prosthetics does not reduce the movement too much.

ThingDef.label: Jade arm
ThingDef.description: Using the jade as the shell, the movable arm of the wooden organ is hidden inside. Due to the good material and the human body phase, coupled with the smart organ, this prosthetics does not reduce the movement too much.

ThingDef.label: Jade foot
ThingDef.description: Using the jade as the shell, the movable foot of the wooden organ is hidden inside. Due to the good material and the human body phase, coupled with the smart organ, this prosthetics does not reduce the movement too much.

ThingDef.label: Jade eye
ThingDef.description: A fake eyeball, carved with jade, is merely decorative and looks very evil under certain angles of light.

ThingDef.label: Black steel hand
ThingDef.description: Prosthetic limbs made of black steel and component are very strong and can exert more strength than the physical body. However, the black steel prosthesis will block the Qi, so that the cultivation speed is slightly reduced.

ThingDef.label: Black steel leg
ThingDef.description: Prosthetic limbs made of black steel and component are very strong and can exert more strength than the physical body. However, the black steel prosthesis will block the Qi, so that the cultivation speed is slightly reduced.

ThingDef.description: Prosthetic limbs made of black steel and component are very strong and can exert more strength than the physical body. However, the black steel prosthesis will block the Qi, so that the cultivation speed is slightly reduced.
